title: Summit Bench Trace Artifact
description: Deterministic execution trace for an AI agent run in the Summit Bench protocol.

trace_version.description: Version of the Summit trace protocol (e.g., '1.0').

agent_id.description: Identifier for the agent or framework that produced this trace (e.g., 'summit-agent', 'langgraph-plugin').

steps.description: Ordered sequence of steps taken by the agent.

evidence_ids.description: List of stable Evidence IDs encountered or produced during the run (e.g., 'EVID:dataset:case:seq').
